name: Wrike
title_tag: Integrate Wrike with Synup to Automate Your Review Management Process
detailed_paragraph:
Wrike + Synup

Empower your review management strategy by blending Wrike’s comprehensive project management capabilities with Synup’s specialized review acquisition and management functionalities.

What is Wrike?

Wrike is a versatile project management tool that boosts collaboration, transparency, and workflow efficiency. It provides a centralized space for work, discussions, and document sharing, streamlining project execution and enhancing team productivity.

Why Wrike + Synup?

  • Coordinated Review Strategy: Utilize Wrike’s project planning tools to develop and manage a coherent strategy that bolsters the effectiveness of your review acquisition process.
  • Automated Review Tasks: Leverage Wrike’s automation features to schedule and manage review solicitations systematically, enhancing response times and overall engagement.
  • Collaborative Review Analysis: Harness Wrike’s collaboration tools, encouraging team involvement in analyzing, interpreting, and strategizing around customer reviews.
  • Customizable Review Workflows: Adapt Wrike’s flexible work management features to craft personalized workflows that resonate with each phase of the review acquisition process.
  • Centralized Review Dashboard: Integrate Synup’s capabilities into Wrike, establishing a unified dashboard for a comprehensive view of reviews and corresponding strategies and actions.
  • Efficient Review Execution: Utilize Wrike’s task management and tracking features to ensure that review-related activities are executed timely and efficiently, optimizing resources and outcomes.

Integrating Wrike with Synup crafts a robust ecosystem that significantly optimizes the strategy, execution, and analysis aspects of your review acquisition and management, enhancing collaboration, customization, and overall efficacy.

How to integrate Wrike + Synup?

Wrike integration for review acquisition is available to all Synup subscribers. To view and manage the integration:

  • Visit the Review acquisition tab on Synup's console.
  • Click on Connect CRM or App Button.
  • Select the Folder or location you want to connect Wrike to.
  • Authenticate your CRM.
  • Finish setting up CRM.
  • Create Review acquisitions using contacts from CRM.

‍
